reason: Downstream adds ID 0 as inactive and counts 63 active types instead of 68, contradicting the source which only lists IDs 17 and 23 as inactive with 68 active types.
proposed_fix: Whether this bonus type is still in active use. 0=deprecated (should not be assigned to new bonuses). Active=0 types: 17=Refill-Negative Balance, 23=Championship Winner Demo. All other 68 types are IsActive=1 (Tier 1 - BackOffice.BonusType)
